name: Metal Cabinet Shelf White - Brightroom™: Kitchen Organizer, Shelf Riser, Iron, 15"x10"x6"
description:
Add modern style to your home while storing and organizing your kitchen essentials with the help of this Metal Cabinet Shelf from Brightroom™. This white stacking cabinet shelf is designed in a rectangle shape to fit nicely in a cabinet while integrating well with your decor style. Made with metal, this cabinet shelf makes a practical addition to your home.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
